Event: Cashback 2025
Event Date: 01/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E66
Lightning Guardian

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit casts electric shield upon self that blocks 26% / 27% / 28% / 29% / 30% / 32% / 35% damage of any type and exists up to 3 sec. For the duration, the unit releases a discharge at a random enemy unit every second. When the discharge hits, it deals 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 / 200000 pure damage and disarms the target. The disarmed enemy cannot use weapon abilities for 2 sec.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit casts electric shield upon self that blocks 28% / 29% / 30% / 31% / 34% / 37% / 40% damage of any type and exists up to 4 sec. For the duration, the unit releases a discharge at a random enemy unit every second. When the discharge hits, it deals 41200 / 58800 / 84000 / 112000 / 140000 / 175000 / 225000 pure damage, disarms the target and removes armor from it. The disarmed enemy cannot use weapon abilities for 3 sec. They also lose 55% armor stats and become unable to use their armor abilities for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit casts electric shield upon self that blocks 36% / 37% / 38% / 39% / 40% / 42% / 45% damage of any type and exists up to 5 sec. For the duration, the unit releases a discharge at a random enemy unit every second. The discharge bounces up to 2 times. When the discharge hits, it deals 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 pure damage, disarms the target and removes armor from it. The disarmed enemy cannot use weapon abilities for 3 sec. They also lose 55% armor stats and become unable to use their armor abilities for 3 sec.
